pi_items.source: Code analysis: setup_task.sh line 15, export_result.sh line 53; Nuxeo REST API path structure; Nuxeo Platform documentation on workspace paths
Code analysis: setup_task.sh line 40, export_result.sh line 61; Nuxeo REST API path structure; Nuxeo Platform documentation on workspace paths

Nuxeo official documentation at https://doc.nuxeo.com/userdoc/favorites/ confirms 'Favorites' as the standard collection name for bookmarking documents; Verified in verifier.py line 57 where 'Favorite' is checked as substring of collection title; Nuxeo Collections feature documentation at https://doc.nuxeo.com/nxdoc/collections/

privileged_info_summary: The task adds two documents to the Nuxeo Favorites collection: 'Annual Report 2023' located at /default-domain/workspaces/Projects/Annual-Report-2023, and 'Contract Template' located at /default-domain/workspaces/Templates/Contract-Template. Both documents use real PDF files containing synthetic data about ACME Corporation (an 8-page fiscal year 2023 annual report and a 5-page Q3 2023 quarterly report). The 'Favorites' collection is a built-in Nuxeo feature for bookmarking documents. Document membership in collections is tracked via the collectionMember:collectionIds API property.
